name: numeric
description: Number input block with increment/decrement controls.

props.name: value
props.description: Current numeric value of the input.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the new numeric value whenever it changes via stepping or direct keyboard entry.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum allowed value. Defaults to negative infinity.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum allowed value. Defaults to positive infinity.

props.name: step
props.description: Amount to increment or decrement the value when the +/- buttons are pressed.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text displayed below the input when there is no error.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message displayed below the input; also activates the error border colour.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all interaction with the input and step buttons.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling button and input height. sm adds hitSlop to maintain WCAG touch target.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Style applied to the outer container wrapping the label, input row, and helper text.

props.name: testID
props.description: Stable test identifier passed to the underlying TextInput for automated testing.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<Numeric
  label="Quantity"
  value={qty}
  onValueChange={setQty}
  min={1}
  max={99}
  step={1}
/>
